subject: [PATCH RESEND v1] fuse: remove redundant buffer size checks for interrupt and forget requests

reviews.author: Miklos Szeredi
reviews.summary: Identified the patch as correct and applied it, indicating no issues or concerns with the code changes.
reviews.raw_body:
On Thu, 30 Apr 2026 at 13:47, Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com> wrote:

> We can get rid of these checks.
>
> Signed-off-by: Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com>

Applied, thanks.

Miklos

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch removes redundant buffer size checks in the fuse kernel module for interrupt and forget requests, simplifying the code and reducing potential errors.
